vulnerabilities.title: Skew Imbalance Liquidation Risk
vulnerabilities.description: Extremely high skew between long and short positions on specific markets can result in pricing lag that traders might exploit for arbitrage or to force unfair liquidations.
vulnerabilities.impact: HIGH - Loss of liquidity provider funds due to unbalanced market risk.
vulnerabilities.likelihood: MEDIUM - Common during major market trend reversals.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Implement dynamic funding rates that increase exponentially with skew and enforce minimum position durations.
